reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the American radio network owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc.
2. Using that radio network, determine which song by Senegalese-American R&B and rapper Akon appeared there.
original_final_question: What song was on an American radio network that is owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc. is a song by Senegalese-American R&B and rapper Akon? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which American radio network is owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc.? Evidence: Radio Disney is an American radio network owned by Disney Channels Worldwide, Inc. -> Radio Disney
Node 2: Which Akon song had an edited version on Radio Disney? Evidence: "Lonely" is a song by Akon, and an edited version was on Radio Disney. -> "Lonely"
